name: goliath/hp-preview
title: Homepage – Preview Process
description: Three-image mosaic section with eyebrow, heading, and two text columns describing the Goliath solution.

heading.default: Racking upright repair built to last

subheading.default: Racking upright repair built to last

bodyIntro.default: Goliath™ is a permanent racking upright repair that stops repeat damage and keeps your warehouse operating safely.

bodyInstalled.default: Installed in minutes. Built to withstand impact.

leftP.default: When warehouse racking damage happens, you know it is not a one-off issue. It is a cycle of hit, repair, and replacement happening continuously. Every incident carries its own cost and risk.

rightP.default: Our permanent racking upright repair system is a durable setup that is engineered to meet UK safety standards. Once installed, it absorbs continuous impacts and prevents future damage. We're the smart solution to repeated upright replacement.

rightOutro.default: Goliath™ doesn't offer a short-term fix. Ours is a long-term cost-saving solution for warehouse racking damage.
